narrative:
Precinct Valley Township C (precinct in Scioto County) has 428 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.5 percentage points.
